segments.text: Sir, the doctor is online, please talk.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Can I speak with Mr. Pranav Yashwant Bhokare?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, sir, I am speaking from Tata AIA Life Insurance. This call is for your telemedical interview. So, can I speak with you now?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Should I speak in Hindi or English?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, please note, the call is being recorded for the company's quality and audit. We have received your insurance proposal, and for its processing, a telephonic medical verification will be required, in which we will ask for your medical and verification details. Whatever questions there are, they will be based on your insurance application form, and this recorded call will last for 10 to 12 minutes. So, can I continue the call?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Whatever information you provide about your health and habits, a proposal form will be created based on that. And if your proposal is accepted, a legal contract will be formed between you and Tata AIA Life Insurance for the insurance. Any wrong answer or incorrect information can affect your policy, or your policy can be terminated or rejected. And your claim can be rejected before or after the policy is issued. So, please give all answers correctly and completely, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So, your details are in front of me. Your full name is Pranav Yashwant Bhokare, correct?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Please tell your date of birth.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Do you do a job or business?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, Software Engineer. What did you provide for ID proof? Aadhaar, PAN card?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Should I enter Software Engineer or IT Software Engineer?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Should I enter Software Engineer or IT Software Engineer?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: You can put Software Engineer. It's an IT professional, right?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, Aadhaar or PAN? What should I put? What did you provide in this?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I had entered the Aadhaar number, but today...
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Please tell the last four digits of Aadhaar.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Tell me the last four digits of Aadhaar.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Last four digits of Aadhaar, correct?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Now I will ask some health-related questions. All questions are important. Please answer in yes or no, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Excuse me for asking this question, but it's important. Have you consumed cigarettes, beedi, paan, gutka, tobacco, or nicotine in the last two years? And where are you located now?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I can't hear you, sir. Please speak a little louder.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So, where are you? Where are you located, you said? Pune?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Excuse me. I will now ask you some health-related questions. All questions are important. Please answer in yes or no, okay? Excuse me for asking this question, but it's important. Have you consumed cigarettes, beedi, paan, gutka, tobacco, or nicotine in the last two years or do you consume it?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Has a doctor ever told you to stop drinking alcohol or to reduce it? Is there anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Narcotics or any recreational drugs not given by a licensed physician and you are taking them? Is there anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Have you ever been told you have low or high blood pressure, high cholesterol, triglycerides or lipids, or has any treatment been recommended for that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Chest pain, chest heaviness, chest discomfort, heart murmur, heart attack, heart valve disorder, coronary heart disease, congenital heart disease, rheumatic fever, palpitations, difficulty breathing, or any heart-related problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Cancer or any pre-cancerous condition, leukemia, enlarged lymph nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sarcoma, tumor, polyps, cysts, nodules, lumps or any growth?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Diabetes or high sugar found in blood or urine, hyperthyroidism, hypothyroidism, or any thyroid or endocrine disorder?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Asthma, bronchitis, sinusitis, tuberculosis, pneumonia, frequent coughing or prolonged coughing, sleep apnea, emphysema, chronic pulmonary disease or any respiratory complaints?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Hepatitis, appendicitis, gallstones, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease or any liver problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Anemia, thalassemia, SLE, blood or any autoimmune disorders?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Anxiety, depression, seizures, paralysis, stroke, transient ischemic attack, Parkinson's, multiple sclerosis, dementia, Alzheimer's, or any neurological, nervous, or mental health problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux, irritable bowel syndrome, frequent indigestion, stomach upset, atrophic gastritis, Barrett's esophagus, ulcerative colitis, Crohn's disease or any pancreas, stomach, or intestine problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Frequent backache, arthritis, gout, slipped disc, muscular deformities, any physical disability or muscle, bone, joint, limb, or spine problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Vision loss, cataract, glaucoma, blurred vision, double vision, or any eye problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Hearing loss, reduced hearing, difficulty speaking, hoarseness in voice, difficulty swallowing, any discharge from the ear, or any ear, nose, throat problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Is there any other information related to your health that we haven't asked and you want to tell us? Is there anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: What did you say about the eyes?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Hello? What did you say about the eyes?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Vision loss, cataract, glaucoma, blurred vision, double vision, or any eye problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Uh, I have normal glasses. That's for vision, right?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Is that for near or far?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Far. Okay. Anything else you want to tell about health?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you had any tests where there was a problem, like blood, urine, X-ray, ECG, CT scan, PET scan, MRI scan?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you undergone any treatment for a problem for more than two weeks, or been told to get a specialist's opinion, or been told to have any tests like blood, urine, X-ray, ECG, CT scan, MRI scan?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any birth defect or hereditary problem like cerebral palsy, Down syndrome, or poliomyelitis?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Are you unable to perform any daily activities, or have you taken leave from work for more than two weeks? Is there anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you been advised any test, treatment, or counseling for HIV, AIDS, or sexually transmitted diseases?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: And besides the information you have provided, has your weight suddenly decreased or increased, or have you been advised to consult a doctor for any problem, or been told to have any surgery? Is there anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So, do you declare that all the information you have provided is true and complete, and your policy records will be based on the information you provided, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So, I am forwarding the case to Tata AIA Life Insurance for further processing. Thank you.
segments.speaker: doctor
